workflows.current_behavior: Telclaude handles private Telegram chat through the relay with Telclaude-owned auth, approvals, memory, provider access, and rollback.
workflows.hermes_target_behavior: Hermes handles the private agent loop behind the Telclaude edge while Telclaude keeps authority, approvals, memory, providers, network containment, and rollback ownership.
workflows.cutover_requirement: All required execution surfaces, network probes, parity fixtures, no-fork proof, and rollback rehearsal must pass from observed evidence before this workflow can flip.
